'''zhazhatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loansharking|loansharking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loansharking|loansharking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhæthæth|zhæzhæthæth]] || [[word:zhæzhæthæj|zhæzhæthæj]] || [[word:zhæzhæthæsh|zhæzhæthæsh]] || [[word:zhæzhæthæ|zhæzhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhazhathath|zhazhazhathath]] || [[word:zhazhazhathaj|zhazhazhathaj]] || [[word:zhazhazhathash|zhazhazhathash]] || [[word:zhazhazhatha|zhazhazhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhathath|zhazhathath]] || [[word:zhazhathaj|zhazhathaj]] || [[word:zhazhathash|zhazhathash]] || [[word:zhazhatha|zhazhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhafthath|zhazhafthath]] || [[word:zhazhafthaj|zhazhafthaj]] || [[word:zhazhafthash|zhazhafthash]] || [[word:zhazhafthaf|zhazhafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazhathatha|zhazhathatha]] || [[word:zhazhathaja|zhazhathaja]] || [[word:zhazhathasha|zhazhathasha]] || [[word:zhazhathaka|zhazhathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazhathath|zhazhathath]] || [[word:zhazhathaj|zhazhathaj]] || [[word:zhazhathash|zhazhathash]] || [[word:zhazhatha|zhazhatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazhathathal|zhazhathathal]] || [[word:zhazhathajal|zhazhathajal]] || [[word:zhazhathashal|zhazhathashal]] || [[word:zhazhathakal|zhazhathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazhathathatha|zhazhathathatha]] || [[word:zhazhathajaja|zhazhathajaja]] || [[word:zhazhathashasha|zhazhathashasha]] || [[word:zhazhathaka|zhazhathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazhathathan|zhazhathathan]] || [[word:zhazhathajan|zhazhathajan]] || [[word:zhazhathashan|zhazhathashan]] || [[word:zhazhathakan|zhazhathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazhathathaoro|zhazhathathaoro]] || [[word:zhazhathajaoro|zhazhathajaoro]] || [[word:zhazhathashaoro|zhazhathashaoro]] || [[word:zhazhathakaoro|zhazhathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
